entity: BBR source abbreviation PHW maps to warehouse canonical PHI (Philadelphia Warriors historical era, 1949)

query_target.sql: SELECT team_id, abbreviation, full_name, city, state, arena, year_founded FROM dim_team WHERE team_id = '1610612744' AND abbreviation = 'PHI'

notes: PHW is the BBR source abbreviation for the Philadelphia Warriors (1949-62 before relocation to San Francisco). dim_team captures this era with abbreviation PHI, full_name 'Philadelphia Warriors', year_founded 1949. The franchise later became the San Francisco Warriors (SF, 1962) and Golden State Warriors (GSW, 1971), all stored under the same team_id 1610612744.
